programme.desc: Tapu Sena is eager to celebrate with the colony as they return from Pune with their award. But, they are not sure how to approach Popatlal as he may still be upset about his cancelled wedding.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In order to connect with each other and share a few laughs, the women of Gokuldham colony organise and attend a kitty party.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to hurry up home after Babita prepares a Bengali cuisine for him. Later, he gets angry when Champaklal interrupts his and Babita's conversation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal gets upset after Goli eats the entire dish prepared by Babita; Jethalal discusses the declining sales with Nattu Kaka and Bagha.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha and Nattu Kakka offer free pani puri on purchases from Gada Electronics; the society's sweeper demands a higher salary.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal, although hesitant, agrees with Bagha and Nattu Kakka's plan to increase sales. On the other hand, people hear about the offer and get excited.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The society members prepare themselves to celebrate and welcome Ganesh Chaturthi.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is confident that the panipuri scheme will be successful; Jethalal informs Bapuji that Nattu Kaka and Bagga had planned a surprise for him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gada Electronics makes amazing profits due to the free unlimited pani puri scheme. However, when the vendor has to go away because of some emergency, Jethalal finds himself in trouble.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Jethalal has no option, he disguises himself as the pani puri vendor and starts selling it himself. He later feels embarrassed when people start recognising him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Jethalal is making and selling the pani puris himself, Iyer and Babita pass by and see him. He gets embarrassed and tries to hide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Jethalal is selling pani puris, the police come and arrest him for putting a stall without permission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone from the society goes to the police station to bail Jethalal after he is arrested for selling pani puris without permission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Jethalal is arrested, everyone from the society tries to bail him out. Chalu Pandey reluctantly listens to Jethalal's side of the story and later realises that he is innocent.

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Police discover 'gold woman' Durga Sawant's body in a jungle. Later, investigation reveals she had recently separated from her husband.

programme.title: CID

programme.desc: When the men of Gokuldham are forced to write poetry for their wives, they ask Taarak for help. However, Taarak refuses to help them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.desc: Jethalal manages to sneak into Popatlal's house so they can begin their party. The Mahila Mandal sends an important vide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A frantic Daya and Jethalal ask Champaklal to stop the kids from going on a hunger strike. They are shocked when Champaklal refuses to oblige and instead asks them to find a way on their own.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Though the parents try different bribes, the children are still adamant about their hunger strike. However, everyone soon becomes worried when Tapu Sena faints.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu falling unconscious leaves everyone in the society on edge. Soon, things get chaotic when the media arrives to cover the strike.

programme.desc: Team CID is urgently called to a housing society regarding something terrible in the building. Soon, the team enters the apartment and are shocked to see a woman covered in blood, holding a crowbar.

programme.title: CID

programme.desc: Rishi and Sonali are madly in love with each other but they elope when their parents disapprove of their relationship. Later, a group of goons chase them in order to kill them.

programme.desc: The whole colony celebrates as Popatlal wins a prestigious government award. Simultaneously, Taarak's boss learns of paranormal activity at his bungalow from a guest.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak requests leave from his boss, who defers a decision. But, the boss is hesitant to approve the leave due to unusual occurrences in his haunted house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak receives an invitation to his boss's home, but not merely for a simple visit. So, his boss asks his help in investigating the strange occurrences happening at his house.

programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.desc: Tapu Sena looks forward to the picnic as the rest of Gokuldham packs their bags. Will this getaway bring new memories for everyone?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members pack their bags and embark on their bungalow picnic with fervor. But, they are unaware of the twists that await them on their road trip.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members finally reach the bungalow, looking forward to three days of relaxation. However, their getaway might turn spooky, just as Taarak's boss suspected.

programme.desc: Shortly after meeting a girl who could be his ideal bride, Popatlal loses his magical ring. Soon, Popatlal is devastated when the girl rejects him.

programme.desc: Jethalal finally caves in and decides to wear the ring. Soon, he begins to experience a radical change in fortunes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Ramesh opens the box to find the statue intact, much to Jethalal and Daya's relief. The residents come to the Gada household to apologise for breaking the statue.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal braces himself when he hears that Daya's brother Sunder is about to visit. On the other hand, an overexcited Daya wakes him up early the next day to get milk for Sunder.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer, devastated by his love life, shares his problems with his friends and asks for advice on how to deal with his broken heart.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal talks to Babita to identify the main reason for Iyer and Babita's broken relationship without mentioning Iyer's name.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: At Gada Electronics, Jethalal organises a secret meeting to save Babita and Iyer's marriage. Babita nearly interrupts the gathering, but Bagha and Jethalal prevent this.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham plan to make Babita jealous and help her reconcile with Iyer by having him pretend to propose to Sweety.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and his friends urge Iyer to act like he is cheating on Babita. Iyer meets up with Sweety at a mall where all the women hang out.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sweety's boyfriend catches Iyer and Sweety pretending to be lovers and beats up Iyer. Iyer and Sweety continue with their plan.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer successfully fools Babita into thinking he is having an affair. The women gather in the community to hear the truth from Iyer as tension rises.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Early in the morning, Jethalal has to endure Sundar at the breakfast table. To add to his woes, Sundar's group of friends arrive unexpectedly. A starving Jethalal wonders what else lies ahead for him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar tries to convince Jethalal to buy a plot from his friend. Sundar, Tapu and his friends go to the beach and have a great time. Jetha accidentally gets locked inside his own storeroom.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal accidentally drops his phone into the toilet. He is horrified to realise that he has been locked in the storeroom. Daya begins to worry about Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya learns from Natu Kaka that Jethalal has left for the airport. Just as Jethalal begins to curse his luck, two thieves break into his storeroom.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The thieves threaten to harm Jethalal unless he helps them steal. Fortunately, cops arrive in time and nab the culprits. Jethalal's luck runs out when the cops mistake him for a thief.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gadas meet Pandeyji to seek his help. Jethalal convinces the cop to call his family.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal, Daya, Sundar and Tapu spot the thieves stealing from Jethalal's storeroom. They use their ingenuity to nab the culprits.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When they hear about Jethalal's ordeal, all members complain to Daya as to why she did not inform them. Jethalal is angered on seeing Sundar's friends and asks who answered the phone earlier.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide visits Jethalal's house with a gift to reward Champaklal, Daya, Tapu, and Sundar for their bravery. Later, Tapu, Jethalal, and Daya try to close Bhide's umbrella.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal wants to give Babita a lift in his umbrella when he sees her standing without an umbrella. Popatlal scolds Bhide after he sees Bhide keeps his broken umbrella near the gate.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and his gang decide to collect large donations for an NGO that helps blind kids for their school's `Roshni Project'.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena begins the process of collecting funds from their locality with enthusiasm, making their parents feel immensely proud.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is furious when Natu Kaka and Bagha make a ridiculous plan to collect donations. Tapu and his friends share a secret plan with Abdul.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and the others are taken aback to see workers decorating the society premises. Bhide is upset to learn that this is all Tapu's doing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the members of Gokuldham gather for the surprise event, they all wonder what Tapu Sena has planned this time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena have formulated a unique plan to enlighten the members on the importance of helping the visually impaired.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While the others want to submit the funds at the school, Tapu wants to help the blind kid. Tapu and his friends get into trouble.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The principal of the school chides the parents of Tapu Sena and asks them to submit the funds and an apology letter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu is shocked to see the blind couple looking hale and hearty and realises it's a con. At home, Jethalal is furious with Tapu and relates the incident to his father.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and losing eight years of memory, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal decides to fire Nattu Kaka and Baagha after assuming that they are planning to leave him. Taarak learns that Jethalal needs help with promoting his store.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak and Jethalal decide to disguise themselves as managers from a tech company and infiltrate Chheda's store.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and losing eight years of memory, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak Mehta learns that Jethalal is growing tired of running his business because of the pressure. Jethalal shouts at Nattu Kakka and Bagha about the store.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When all the men from the society are having soda, Jethalal tells them about his work problems. Champaklal learns of this and motivates him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Goli catches Taarak throwing away the bitter gourd juice given to him by Anjali. After seeing the newspaper ad, Jethalal's neighbours decide to talk to him about the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A strange kid refuses to give his mother's mobile number until Bawri agrees to his request. Taarak tries to help Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal assures Champaklal that he will not sell his shop and learns that Nattu Kaka and Baga are responsible for putting the ad in the newspaper.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal remembers that when he was in a desperate situation, he had asked Nattu Kaka and Bagha to sell the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Nattu Kaka and Bagha tell Jethalal why they decided to sell the shop. Magan reveals that the new owner wants them to vacate the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Two well-built men try to hoist banners outside Jethalal's shop and ask him to sign the licensing agreement of the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Two men inform Jethalal that Surma Bhai wishes to acquire his property. When Champaklal pleads with them to let him meet Surma Bhai, they arrange for a meeting at midnight.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide informs Jethalal's neighbours that Jethalal is in trouble. Jethalal calls Mehta and asks him to accompany him for his meeting with Surma Bhai.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal shares his worries regarding the shop with his neighbours. Popatlal informs him that he has found someone whom Surma Bhai will listen to.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Kajal Behen demands INR 50 lakhs from Jethalal in exchange for her help. Surma Bhai's thugs call and threaten Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's friends decide to meet Surma Bhai and to convince him to let go of the shop. They accompany Jethalal to meet Surma Bhai at Madh Island.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: At Madh Island, Jethalal and his neighbours lose their way and spot a woman wearing a white saree and holding a diya. At Surma Bhai's bungalow, a man recounts his harrowing tale.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Surma Bhai shows Jethalal a video in which Nattu Kaka tells that Jethalal has agreed to sell the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the adults of Gokuldham furiously demand an explanation from Iyer, who appears unfazed. However, he reveals something that shocks Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita stays with Jethalal after Iyer tells her he wants a divorce. Champaklal kicks Iyer out of the community. Babita decides to go through with the divorce.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita decides to call a lawyer. Bhide, Sodhi and Popatlal bring food for Iyer to console him in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide, Sodhi, and Popatlal ponder Iyer's decision to divorce. Bhide thinks about the C wing of Gokuldham, where everyone is unmarried. Babita has a restless night.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With the divorce procedure in motion, Iyer and Babita decide to leave Gokuldham despite everyone's protests. They share one last car ride before separating.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The people of Gokuldham realise that Iyer misunderstood Babita and race to get in contact with them. Iyer and Babita all of a sudden return to Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The misunderstanding between Iyer and Babita is cleared up. However, Maushami, Babita's friend, comes to Gokuldham to thank her for something unknown to everyone else.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men discuss friendships on social media. The ladies of Gokuldham are elated due to the cosy climate caused by the rain.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal walks in to see the women dancing in the rain. A surprise awaits Jethalal as he reaches the shop and gets out of the raincoat that Daya made him wear in the morning.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal ensures that Iyer and Babita don't see him returning home splattered in mud. Iyer wants to shoot a video of Jethalal in dirty clothes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Taarak comes home late from work, Anjali gets worried. Later, she finds Taarak's behaviour quite strange.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali suspects that Taarak is hiding something in his laptop when he behaves in a secretive manner and she starts to worry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya enters just as Anjali mulls over her next move. She's shocked when Anjali reveals the reason for her worry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Anjali overhears a conversation between Daya and Jethalal, it upsets her deeply and she decides to leave her house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali hides in Jethalal and Daya's home. Jethalal follows Taarak and is shocked to see him with a woman.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After coming back home, Jethalal reveals the truth about Taarak and the woman to a shocked Anjali and Champaklal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Taarak is confronted, he decides to reveal the truth about Kavita. The society members go to the police station.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Goli's uncle and aunt come to visit Gokuldham Society with their smug son Monty. However, as soon as Monty meets Tapu, he challenges the leader of Tapu Sena and angers him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Tapu and his friends commence their night cricket, Goli's rude cousin joins them and wreaks havoc in the match.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena's plans for a night cricket match enrages Bhide. When he quarrels with Jethalal about it, Taarak proposes a cricket match between the two.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society excitedly prepare to participate in their very first cricket match. Rival captains Bhide and Jethalal choose their team members.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Jethalal's teams receive flashy names and sponsors for Gokuldham Premier League and the preparations for the big cricket match begin.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Gokuldham Premier League approaches, the showdowns between Bhide and Jethalal's teams begin. They hold a meeting to discuss the rules of the grand match.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar pays a surprise visit to Gokuldham Society and brings a special gift for Jethalal. However, Sundar's grand announcement becomes Jethalal's biggest issue.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After learning there will be a cricket match in Gokuldham Society, Sundar surprises everyone. He gets Jethalal a strange gift.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham Premier League takes an interesting turn when Jethalal has to bowl against Daya and Tapu. As the first inning concludes, Jethalal and his team prepare to bat.
